title: e2e-test-mixed
brief: Visual journey from financial analysis to celestial landscapes. An animated options payoff diagram transitions to a glimmering city at night, then ascends through luminous clouds toward a mountain peak at dawn, creating a progression from chart to urban glow to natural majesty.
global_style: cinematic 35mm anamorphic lens, deep shadow contrast, cool blue color grading

scenes.storyboard_prompt: Animated call option payoff diagram with dark background, x-axis labeled 'Stock Price at Expiry', y-axis labeled 'P&L', green hockey-stick payoff curve, orange dashed strike line at center, translucent green profit zone
scenes.description: Animate a simple call option payoff diagram. Draw x-axis labeled 'Stock Price at Expiry' and y-axis labeled 'P&L'. Trace a hockey-stick green payoff curve from left to right. Add a vertical orange dashed line at the midpoint labeled 'Strike'. Fill the profit zone (right of strike, above x-axis) with translucent green.
scenes.style: dark background #0a0a0a, profit green #00e676, strike orange #f7931e, white axes

scenes.storyboard_prompt: Breathtaking nighttime aerial shot looking down at a vast modern city, thousands of amber and blue street lights forming geometric grid patterns stretching to the horizon, glass skyscrapers glowing gold and teal
scenes.video_prompt: city lights glimmering and pulsing below, light trails of moving traffic flowing along highways, slow sweeping pullback revealing more of the city
scenes.camera: very high aerial shot, slow sweeping pullback, 35mm anamorphic
scenes.motion: traffic light trails flowing along roads, building windows pulsing, camera slowly pulling back
scenes.style: deep navy night sky, warm amber city lights, teal and blue accent towers
scenes.negative: text, watermark, blurry, low quality, people visible, daylight

scenes.storyboard_prompt: Sweeping cinematic aerial shot descending through luminous clouds at dawn, warm golden and soft blue light breaking through the mist, revealing a mountain peak below emerging from the cloud layer, dramatic rim lighting on cloud edges, vast landscape stretching far below
scenes.video_prompt: camera gliding downward through soft clouds, golden light streaming through from above, mountain peak gradually emerging below, clouds parting to reveal vast landscape, dramatic light rays cutting through mist
scenes.camera: high aerial descent, slow push-down through clouds, 35mm anamorphic
scenes.motion: camera descending through clouds, golden light rays shifting, clouds parting gradually, mountain peak coming into view
scenes.style: warm golden dawn light, soft blue sky, dramatic cloud atmosphere, cool blue color grading
scenes.negative: text, watermark, blurry, low quality, people visible, night sky
